For trophies/achievements it's recommended to start the game with Guided Exploration Mode turned OFF (removes certain waypoints). When you turn this on, the game gives a warning that it will void some trophies, but this is a bit misleading. It only voids a single trophy![Image 1: trophy](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/trophy.png)**Scouting Mission** for using a Scout, because the scouting feature isn't available in Guided Mode.All other trophies are still doable with Guided Mode turned on. After getting the trophy you can still turn on Guided Mode from the gameplay options for the rest of the game. Whether you play in Canon Mode doesn't matter, and all trophies are doable on the easiest difficulty.
